author: Shane
body: Thanks so much for posting this… these guys sound awesome!!!

author: Horse
body:
High On Stress just got a new fan :D

Sweet tunes for sure – enjoyed ‘Gold Star’ the most thats a nice track!

author: Burgo
Tamz
body: any idea whether their new album will be available online?

author: Burgo
body:
Hi Tamz,  
I’d have to ask the guys and get back to you… but seeing as their last album is available at amazon (and also iTunes, I believe), I wouldn’t think that this one would be any different.

author: Mike
body: Damn Burgo… nice find, these are great tunes!

author: Burgo
body:
@ Mike,  
Thanks mate… glad you enjoyed!

@ Tamz,  
Following up from your earlier question regarding whether the album will be available online, I just received this message from Nick:

_“I saw that one of your readers asked if the album would be available online. It will be on CDBABY. com on September 2nd and Itunes around that time as well._

thanks!

NICK”

author: Mark
body:
Just wanted to let you kind readers know that “Cop Light Parade” is available right NOW at:  
[http://www.cdbaby.com/highonstress2](http://www.cdbaby.com/highonstress2)

and also available with a bonus CD with three extra tracks at:  
[http://www.koolkatmusik.com/showproduct.aspx?productid=4861](http://www.koolkatmusik.com/showproduct.aspx?productid=4861)

or you can contact [Ray@koolkatmusik.com](mailto:Ray@koolkatmusik.com) to use PayPal

Thanks everyone for the compliments and interest in our music!
